data.name: Throbbin Hood 🏹🔞
data.detailed_description:
Throbbin Hood 🏹🔞 是一款充滿解謎、幽默與大膽改編傳奇故事的2D視覺小說。本遊戲包含18+內容。



在這個另類版本中，主角被剝奪了頭銜與財富。諾丁漢郡長肆意統治，城市陷入腐敗，人民失去希望。主角不再躲藏，而是決定組建團隊、發動反抗並奪回城市——以自己的方式。

與你並肩作戰:


  • Annet —— 口才犀利、技巧更高超的女盜賊。
  • Scarlet —— 幾乎從不失手的致命弓箭手。
  • 甚至連郡長的妻子，也對他的統治方式感到不滿。

    你們將幫助市民、瓦解政權、拉攏士兵並策劃一場毫無失敗可能的起義。

    期待機智對話、火辣場景、聰明謎題以及影響故事發展的選擇。



    🔥 對傳奇的精彩重塑
    💋 大量性感與挑逗場景
    🧩 劇情驅動的解謎與小遊戲
    🎨 生動的2D角色與流暢動畫
    🍑 多樣化的成人場景
    😉 可單手操作的輕鬆玩法 ( ͡~ ͜ʖ ͡°)

    準備好劫富濟貧、贏得芳心並改寫傳奇了嗎？ 🏹

data.short_description: Throbbin Hood 🏹🔞 是一款火辣的2D視覺小說，主角建立反抗團隊、解開巧妙謎題、魅惑危險盟友並推翻腐敗的郡長。在這個大膽改編的傳奇中，幽默、選擇、小遊戲與眾多火辣邂逅正等待著你。
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS:
  • 處理器: Apple M1 або Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Throbbin Hood 🏹🔞
data.detailed_description:
Throbbin Hood 🏹🔞 is a 2D visual novel packed with puzzles, comedy, and a bold twist on a legendary tale. The game contains 18+ content.



In this alternative take, the main hero has been stripped of his title and fortune. The Sheriff of Nottingham rules unchecked, the city is drowning in corruption, and the people have lost hope. Instead of hiding in the shadows, the main hero decides to build a crew, spark a rebellion, and take the city back — with style.

On your side:


  • Annet — a sharp-tongued thief with even sharper skills.
  • Scarlet — a deadly archer who almost never misses.
  • And even the Sheriff’s own wife, who’s not exactly thrilled with how her husband runs the city.

    Together, you’ll help the townsfolk, undermine the regime, flip the Sheriff’s soldiers to your side, and plan a rebellion that leaves him with zero chances to stay in power.

    Expect witty dialogue, spicy situations, clever puzzles, and choices that shape how the uprising unfolds — loud and chaotic or smooth and calculated.



    🔥 A gripping alternative take on a legendary story
    💋 A multitude of sexy and provocative situations
    🧩 Story-driven puzzles and fun minigames
    🎨 Expressive 2D characters with smooth animations and vibrant artwork
    🍑 Plenty of lewd scenes with a variety of girls
    😉 Comfortable gameplay that lets you play with one hand ( ͡~ ͜ʖ ͡°)

    Ready to steal from the corrupt, win hearts, and rewrite the legend your way? 🏹

data.short_description: Throbbin Hood 🏹🔞 is a spicy 2D visual novel where the main hero builds a rebellious crew, solves clever puzzles, charms dangerous allies, and topples a corrupt Sheriff. Comedy, choices, minigames, and plenty of lewd encounters await in this bold legend remix.

*languages with full audio support
